name: Is there free help if ChatGPT messed up my case strategy?
description: Try legal aid; disclose AI use.[6]

mainEntity.name: Is there free help if ChatGPT messed up my case strategy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Try legal aid; disclose AI use.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Legal aid societies or pro bono clinics assist low-income users, but explain AI involvement fully.[6] No AI-specific free fixes.[1] Key factors: Income eligibility; case merit; location. Search local bar pro bono; act before deadlines. Verify all advice received.
